title: Son of Mango Fashion Chain’s Founder Is Arrested as Suspect in His Death
summary_full: Isak Andic, the billionaire who built the Spanish brand, died while hiking with his son in 2024. News outlets had reported that the son was under investigation.
summary_public: Isak Andic, the billionaire who built the Spanish brand, died while hiking with his son in 2024. News outlets had reported that the son was under investigation.

ES.label: neutral
